# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Create a Helm chart deployment template that always pulls the latest container images. Set imagePullPolicy to Always so users get the newest versions. This is for our fast-moving development environment where we deploy multiple times per day.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: {{ include "mychart.fullname" . }}
  labels:
    {{- include "mychart.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
spec:
  replicas: {{ .Values.replicaCount }}
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      {{- include "mychart.selectorLabels" . | nindent 8 }}
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        {{- include "mychart.selectorLabels" . | nindent 8 }}
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: {{ .Chart.Name }}
          image: "{{ .Values.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.image.tag }}"
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          ports:
            - containerPort: {{ .Values.containerPort }}
          livenessProbe:
            {{- include "mychart.probe.liveness" . | nindent 12 }}
          readinessProbe:
            {{- include "mychart.probe.readiness" . | nindent 12 }}
          resources:
            {{- toYaml .Values.resources | nindent 12 }}
          env:
            {{- include "mychart.env" . | nindent 12 }}
